_comment: Replace REPLACE-WITH-YOUR-FUNCTION-APP-HOST with the hostname output from your Bicep deployment (see docs/deployment/bicep-deploy.md). Global example: crm-agent-dev.azurewebsites.net. China example: crm-agent-prod.chinacloudsites.cn. Every tool call needs Authorization: Bearer <user-jwt> from the host; how that JWT is obtained depends on the host.
